content:
🌟 reclip | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: Downloading videos and audio from a wide variety of websites through a user-friendly web interface.
✨ Key Features: • Download videos from 1000+ supported sites (via yt-dlp) • MP4 video or MP3 audio extraction • Quality/resolution picker • Bulk downloads • Automatic URL deduplication
📖 Summary: ReClip is a self-hosted, open-source media downloader that allows users to download videos and audio from over 1000 websites. It features a clean web UI, supports MP4 and MP3 formats, and offers quality selection and bulk download capabilities.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
